title: goniopteris iguapensis
intro: Goniopteris iguapensis, also known as the Iguape fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is native to South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Goniopteris iguapensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
